Our Mission

Christ-Centered.
Restoration & Recovery.
For Every Life.

Refined Recovery Network exists to restore lives, rebuild families, and return people to purpose — through the power of Jesus Christ. Every tool we build, every Refined Place we launch, every partnership we form serves that one mission. The technology makes it scalable. The covenant makes it real.

"Pure religion and undefiled before God and the Father is this, To visit the fatherless and widows in their affliction, and to keep himself unspotted from the world."
James 1:27 KJV
This is not a metaphor. Pure religion visits people in their affliction — in the recovery house, in the courtroom, behind the prison wall, at the family table, and on the worksite. RRN was built to go there.
3
Active Refined Places
52
Weeks of curriculum
LA
Louisiana-rooted
What RRN Is Built On
Christian Discipleship
RRN is first and foremost a discipleship ministry. We build believers — men and women who know the Word, walk in accountability, grow in leadership, and carry the Gospel into every area of their lives. Recovery is one expression of discipleship. The platform serves every believer who wants to go deeper.
✓52-lesson covenant curriculum — KJV throughout
✓Daily Scripture, journaling, and memory verses
✓Step exams — members must understand, not just complete
✓CALEB AI companion — available 24/7 with KJV responses
✓Prayer, devotional, and testimony systems
Leadership Development
Every person who comes through RRN is a future leader. The platform tracks transformation, identifies emerging leaders, and provides the training infrastructure for members to become mentors, facilitators, and eventually Certified Life Catalyst Coaches who can launch their own Refined Place. The goal is not dependency — it is multiplication.
✓Life Catalyst Coach certification pathway
✓Mentor matching — walking with the next generation
✓Transformation score tracks readiness for leadership
✓Leadership development curriculum — ambassador track
✓Victory Wall — community witnesses transformation
Recovery & Addiction Support
For people rebuilding from addiction, incarceration, and broken lives — RRN provides a complete structured recovery system rooted in the power of Jesus Christ. Not a 12-step program. Not a disease model. A covenant-based restoration process that addresses the whole person — spiritual, relational, vocational, and physical — without apology.
✓Covenant-based curriculum — no AA/disease model
✓Accountability check-ins, trigger tracking, relapse prevention
✓Counseling sessions — video, in-person, and CALEB AI
✓Court compliance documentation — court-formatted reports
✓Housing, workforce, transportation — the full restoration path
Family & Community Restoration
Restoration does not stop at the individual. RRN supports the whole household — reunification plans, parenting development, marriage restoration, family accountability, and the community infrastructure that keeps people stable long after the crisis passes. The platform documents every step for courts and funders.
✓Family reunification plans — court-documented
✓Parenting skills, marriage restoration, anger management
✓Community resource hub — food, health, legal, state services
✓Financial literacy — budgeting, debt, credit restoration
✓Chariot transportation — no car no longer means no access
Job Readiness & Employment
Employment is a core restoration milestone. RRN prepares every member to enter the workforce with a verified profile, pastor-backed accountability, and employer-ready documentation — then connects them to Louisiana employers actively seeking accountable candidates.
✓AI Resume Builder — strength-forward for gaps and records
✓Video interview prep — mock interviews, confidence building
✓Employer pipeline — pre-screened, pastor-accountable placements
✓WOTC documentation — up to $9,600 per qualifying hire
✓Job matching — construction, trades, CDL, healthcare, logistics
✓90-day retention support — accountability stays active post-hire
Education & Certification
Credentials open doors that character alone cannot. RRN's education track prepares members for GED completion, trade certifications, and career-specific credentials — documented in a verified Certification Vault employers and courts can access directly.
✓GED preparation — math, reading, science, social studies
✓OSHA 10 & 30 — construction and general industry
✓CDL preparation — commercial driver licensing pathway
✓Certification Vault — HVAC, welding, forklift, ServSafe tracked
✓Computer literacy & financial literacy — life skill foundation
✓WIOA training reimbursement — up to 50% of training costs
Who This Platform Serves
✓People in addiction recovery rebuilding their lives
✓Returning citizens re-entering work and society
✓Church members pursuing deeper Christian discipline
✓Believers called to leadership and ministry
✓Families rebuilding after addiction and incarceration
✓Pastors building complete ministry infrastructure
✓Courts and probation seeking structured accountability
✓Employers seeking accountable, pastor-backed candidates
✓Churches building or expanding recovery ministry
✓Impact investors seeking documented restoration outcomes
Our Foundation
"The Spirit of the Lord is upon me, because he hath anointed me to preach the gospel to the poor; he hath sent me to heal the brokenhearted, to preach deliverance to the captives, and recovering of sight to the blind, to set at liberty them that are bruised."
Luke 4:18 KJV
"He healeth the broken in heart, and bindeth up their wounds."
Psalm 147:3 KJV
Request Platform Access
What Makes RRN Different
✓KJV only. No modern translations. Scripture as written.
✓No disease model. Covenant-based, not clinical. The Holy Ghost is the power source.
✓No AA/Serenity Prayer. Biblical steps, biblical language, biblical authority.
✓Pastor accountability. Every member has a pastor — not a sponsor.
✓Recovery start date. Not a sobriety date. Covenant language throughout.
✓Complete system. Housing, workforce, transportation, courts, family, grants — not just meetings.
✓Scalable network. Every Refined Place runs on the same platform. One system, every community.

Your Personal
Recovery Guide.
Available 24/7.

CALEB is not a chatbot. CALEB is a Covenant Accountability Liaison and Encouragement Bot — a scripture-anchored AI companion that knows your progress, remembers your struggles, speaks in KJV, and walks alongside you every single day. No other recovery platform has anything like it.

✓Knows exactly where you are in your 52-week curriculum
✓Responds with KJV scripture matched to your situation

✓Available at 2am when no one else is awake

From Powerlessness
to Covenant Living.

KJV Scripture Throughout
King James Version on every lesson and AI response. No modern translations. No secular recovery model.
Quizzes & Step Exams
70% lesson pass. 80% step exam required. Members must understand to advance — not simply complete.
Memory Scripture
Every lesson includes 2–3 memory verses tracked in the platform. The Word inside changes behavior.
Daily Reading Plan
7 daily readings per week with journal reflection, accountability tracking, and mentor visibility.
Fully Customizable Path

Milestone Recognition

Video Sessions & Telehealth

Every Session.
Every Meeting.
From Anywhere.

No app to download. No account to create. Encrypted video sessions built directly into the RRN platform — for one-on-one counseling, group recovery meetings, employer interviews, court check-ins, mentor sessions, and family accountability calls. Any device. Any location. Any time.

✓ One-on-one counseling sessions — CALEB notes session topics, generates journal prompts, and logs attendance for court reporting
✓ Group recovery meetings — Host live group sessions with attendance tracking, hand-raise, recording, and screen sharing
✓ Employer interviews — No car required. Members interview directly with employers inside the platform. Removes transportation as a hiring barrier.
✓ Court & probation check-ins — Video attendance logged and formatted as court-compliant documentation automatically
✓ Mentor & accountability sessions — Pastor connects with member face-to-face regardless of distance. KJV scripture woven into every closing.
✓ Family accountability calls — Reunification sessions documented. Family members join from anywhere. CALEB monitors for distress signals in real time.
✓ Live broadcast ministry sessions — Stream recovery teachings, church services, and curriculum lessons to members at any location
Get Platform Access Court Video Check-Ins
One-on-One Counseling
Private encrypted session. CALEB journal prompts after every meeting. Session logged for progress tracking and court reporting. 42 CFR Part 2 protected.
Group Recovery Meetings
Multi-participant sessions with attendance tracking, hand raise, screen sharing, and recording. Scripture-based closing built in. Attendance auto-documented.
Employer Interviews
Members interview with employers directly in the platform. No car, no transportation barrier. Encrypted. Interview record retained for compliance. 90% complete.
Court & Probation Check-Ins
Video attendance formatted as court-compliant documentation. Probation officers receive auto-generated attendance logs. Eliminates missed check-ins due to transportation.
Family & Reunification Sessions
Family members join from any location. Session documented for reunification tracking and court-ordered family program compliance. CALEB monitors for distress.
Federal Compliance
All session records protected under 42 CFR Part 2. Session notes are clinical documentation — shared only with written member consent or valid court order. Encrypted end-to-end. No third-party app required.
For Courts, Probation Officers & DA Offices

Replace Missed Appearances
With Verified Video Check-Ins.

Transportation is the number one reason court-ordered program participants miss required check-ins. Every missed check-in generates a violation report, a warrant, a hearing, and hours of officer time. RRN's video check-in system eliminates that cycle entirely — replacing transportation failures with verified, timestamped, documented video sessions that courts accept as compliance evidence.

â†’Court Check-In session type built into the platform — one tap, no app download
â†’Session automatically logged: date, time, duration, participant identity, notes
â†’Compliance document auto-generated and added to member's court compliance file
â†’Probation Officer Meeting session type — officer joins via secure link, no account needed
â†’Officer dashboard shows attendance, session history, and compliance status in real time
â†’Monthly and weekly compliance reports include video check-in log — formatted for court submission
â†’42 CFR Part 2 compliant throughout — session records protected under federal law
Set Up Court Video Check-Ins Request a Briefing
How a Probation Officer Uses It
1
Officer receives dashboard access — sees all referred clients, their check-in schedule, and compliance status
2
Client launches Court Check-In session from their phone — no app, no account, one tap
3
Officer joins via secure link — face-to-face video check-in completed from any location
4
Session auto-logs: timestamp, duration, identity, notes — compliance document generated instantly
5
Monthly compliance report includes full video check-in history — ready for court submission
"The number one reason people violate their probation is transportation — not intent. Video check-ins remove that barrier entirely while maintaining the face-to-face accountability courts require."
— RRN Court Partnership Model

Chariot Community Transportation

No Car. No Problem.
And an Opportunity to Earn.

Chariot is not a feature — it is a complete transportation ministry platform. It solves two problems at once: transportation barriers for members and income opportunities for community drivers. Recovery-aware. Ministry-connected. Purpose-driven.

For Members & Riders
No car. No problem. Get where you need to go.
✓Work, court, treatment, church, medical
✓Female driver preference — always available
✓Court compliance rides auto-documented
✓Safety pings to trusted contacts
✓Smart scheduling — knows your appointments
✓Transparent pricing — no surprises

For Community Drivers

✓Transparent per-ride earnings

✓Ministry-endorsed — serve your neighbors

FOR CHURCHES
Your Bus Ministry — Without the Bus
Replace your bus ministry for a fraction of the cost.
✓No bus to buy, insure, or maintain
✓No commercial driver license required
✓Pick up members for Sunday service
✓Bible study, prayer meetings, youth events

Partner With Chariot
Churches — The Bus Ministry Problem Is Solved

Most Small Churches Cannot Afford a Bus Ministry.
Chariot Changes That.

A church bus costs $30,000–$80,000 to purchase, requires a CDL driver, demands commercial insurance, and breaks down. Most small and mid-size churches have had to abandon their bus ministry entirely — leaving elderly members, disabled members, and families without vehicles stranded at home on Sunday morning.

Chariot gives your church a fully operational transportation ministry without owning a single vehicle. Your congregation members with cars become vetted community drivers. You coordinate pickups through the Chariot platform. Every ride is documented, every driver is verified, every member is accounted for.

Set Up Church Transportation Partner With RRN
Traditional Bus Ministry Cost
$30,000–$80,000+
Bus purchase + CDL driver + commercial insurance + maintenance + fuel + repairs
Chariot Church Transportation
Per ride only
No vehicle purchase Â· No CDL required Â· No commercial insurance Â· Vetted community drivers Â· Full platform management
"Every church wants to bring people in. Not every church can afford the bus to do it. Chariot removes that barrier permanently."
— Chuck Edwards, Founder, RRN
Female Driver Preference
Female members request female drivers on every booking — a safety standard, not an option.

Transparent Pricing

Available Now — Building Partnerships
Courts, DA Offices & Justice Partners

The Accountability Platform
Courts Have Been Waiting For.
We Are Licensed. We Are Ready.

Refined Recovery Network is actively building relationships with Louisiana courts, district attorneys, judges, and magistrates. We are licensed, operational, and ready to serve as your court-mandated accountability partner — delivering the documentation courts require, the real-time oversight officers need, and the structured programming that actually reduces recidivism.

Court-Ready Documentation
Every report generated by RRN is formatted specifically for court submission — lesson attendance, program hours, milestone completions, drug test scheduling, ride compliance logs, counselor notes, and employment verification. No manual paperwork. Automated, timestamped, and court-formatted.
Real-Time Oversight
Probation officers and case managers get real-time visibility into every client's status — without calling, without chasing paperwork, without waiting for monthly reports. Log in and see exactly where every court-referred client stands at any moment.
Structured Programming That Works
52-week evidence-based curriculum with step exams, memory work, accountability check-ins, and mentor engagement. Not a paper program — a living, documented accountability system with CALEB AI available 24/7 for crisis intervention and support.
Who We Partner With
District Attorneys & Prosecutors
Diversion program documentation, plea agreement compliance tracking, and outcome reporting that demonstrates successful program completion for record-sealing and sentencing considerations.
Judges & Magistrates
Court-ordered program with verified completion documentation, automatic violation alerts, and milestone letters formatted for sentencing hearings, parole reviews, and probation modifications.
Probation & Parole Officers
Live dashboard access to every client's accountability metrics. Attendance, lesson completion, employment status, housing stability, transportation logs, and behavioral alerts — all in one place without a single phone call.
Prisons & Re-Entry Programs
Pre-release curriculum enrollment, post-release accountability tracking, employment pipeline connection, housing readiness, document recovery, and transportation — the complete re-entry ecosystem in one platform.
Drug Courts & Diversion Programs
Purpose-built for drug court compliance requirements — drug test scheduling and tracking, mandatory meeting attendance, program hour documentation, and graduation milestone reporting. 42 CFR Part 2 compliant throughout.

â†’Program graduation and certification documentation
Federal Compliance

All member recovery records are protected under 42 CFR Part 2 — the federal law governing substance use disorder records that is stricter than HIPAA. RRN shares compliance documentation only with explicit written consent from the member or under valid court order, fully compliant with federal law.

Courts and probation officers receive the accountability reports they need. Member recovery records remain federally protected. Both are fully compatible within the RRN framework.

Document Recovery & Identity Rebuilding

Get Your Life
Back on Paper.

You cannot get a job, open a bank account, get housing, or access benefits without your documents. RRN's Document Recovery system guides you through recovering every piece of your identity — step by step, with CALEB walking alongside you.

Birth Certificate
State filing + expedited options
State ID / Driver's License

Vital Records
Marriage, divorce, death records
Credit Restoration
Guided dispute and rebuild process
Records Expungement
Louisiana expungement guidance
Get Free Access — Start Recovery

Why Documents Matter First

A person leaving incarceration or a recovery program with no ID, no birth certificate, and no social security card cannot get a job, cannot get housing, cannot open a bank account, and cannot access the benefits they are entitled to. Document recovery is not paperwork — it is the gateway to everything else.

CALEB guides you through every step
State-specific Louisiana processes documented
Fee waiver programs identified automatically
Progress tracked in your member profile
Documents stored securely in your vault
Family, Community & Spiritual Life

Restoration Goes
Beyond the Individual.

Recovery is a family event. RRN supports the entire household — reunification planning, parenting skills, family accountability, community resources, prayer networks, and the daily spiritual disciplines that make transformation stick.

Family Reunification
Step-by-step plans for rebuilding family relationships, custody compliance, and re-establishing trust with children and spouses.

Victory Wall

Progress Tracking

Pre-Launch — Express Interest Now
Investment Ecosystem

Invest in Recovery.
Earn Returns. Change Lives.

RRN is building a tokenized investment ecosystem across four program categories. Each structured as a separate SPV LLC with SEC-compliant offering. No funds collected at this stage — expressing interest places you on the priority list for when formal offerings launch.

Legal Structure

RRN uses a Delaware Series LLC master structure — one master entity formed once, with each investment category operating as a protected series inside it. This dramatically reduces formation costs per investment while maintaining full legal separation between assets. Each series issues its own tokens or membership interests under Reg D or Reg CF. Investment activity is completely separate from ministry charitable operations.

Series LLC
Master + per-series structure
Reg CF / D
SEC exemption path
Private Only
No gov. funds to investors
Counsel First
Attorney required before launch

Express Investment Interest
No commitment. No funds collected. Priority notification list for formal offering launch. Team follows up within 48 hours.
Thank you. Interest recorded. Our team will contact you within 48 hours.
Interest only — no funds collected. Not a securities offering. Each investment structured as separate SPV LLC. WOTC credits and government grants cannot flow to investors. All formal investment via Reg CF or Reg D after SEC and attorney review. Projected returns are estimates only. Consult your financial and legal advisor.

How the Network Grows

One Platform.
Every Refined Place.
The Network Expands.

The RRN platform is what makes the network possible. A local leader with a calling gets the full system — curriculum, AI companion, workforce pipeline, transportation, court compliance, housing tools, grants, and financial management — deployed and running on day one. Every new Refined Place strengthens the entire network. The platform is the engine. The locations are the impact.

"The platform powers every Refined Place. Every Refined Place grows the network."

Every Refined Place location runs on the RRN platform — curriculum, CALEB AI, workforce tools, Chariot, court reporting, housing management, grants, and financial tracking all in one system. The platform makes it possible for a local leader to operate a full-service restoration center from day one. That is how the network scales without losing quality or accountability.

What Partner Ministries Gain
Technology Infrastructure
Track participant progress, manage referrals, coordinate volunteers, connect individuals to resources, access educational content, measure outcomes, and maintain digital records — all through the RRN platform at no cost to network partners.
Workforce Development
Employment preparation, skills development pathways, career coaching, WOTC documentation, and the full RRN employer pipeline — available to every ministry in the network and every person they serve.
Grant & Funding Opportunities
Network ministries gain access to collaborative grant applications, community development grants, workforce grants, technology grants, family support initiatives, and recovery re-entry funding — submitted with the strength of a documented network behind them.
Chariot Transportation
Every network ministry has access to Chariot — the community transportation platform that replaces expensive bus ministries, serves members without vehicles, and generates income for community drivers.
Shared Curriculum & Training
The complete 52-lesson RRN curriculum, Life Catalyst Coach training, facilitator guides, and all educational materials — available to every Refined Place location without duplication of effort.
Community Referral Network
Network ministries cross-refer clients, share housing resources, connect individuals to jobs across partner locations, and build the kind of regional support system no single ministry can build alone.
Three Ways to Participate — No Rebranding Required
TIER 1
Full Refined Place Location
Fully branded network hub Â· Regional anchor Â· Complete system deployment
What they carry
✓"Refined Place" designation and branding
✓Full RRN platform — all systems active
✓Regional anchor and training center role
✓Full reporting, compliance, and grant systems
✓Certified Life Catalyst Coach on site
✓LLC or incorporated entity required
✓Liability insurance required (program tier determines minimum)
✓Own 501(c)(3) or covered under RRN fiscal sponsorship policy
Examples
Refined Place Port Allen — Chuck Edwards
Bushnell's Front Porch Ministry — Refined Place Pineville
Anchored In Hope Ministry — Refined Place St. Amant
BRAND EXTENSION LICENSE — ALLOWED LANGUAGE
"Refined Place [City]"
"Refined Place Network Center: [Name]"
Full approved brand asset usage
TIER 2
Affiliate Partner Church or Ministry
Co-Branded Affiliate Â· Keep your name Â· Structured endorsement language only

For churches and ministries with established identities — Celebrate Recovery groups, independent recovery ministries, church outreach programs — that want network access without changing who they are. No rebranding. No identity change. No model change.

They keep
✓Their own ministry name and branding
✓Their existing recovery model
✓Full independence and leadership
They gain
✓Technology platform — tracking, referrals, dashboards
✓Housing, jobs, and Chariot transportation network
✓Grant collaboration opportunities
✓Workforce pipeline access
✓Cross-referral with Refined Place locations
AFFILIATE ENDORSEMENT LICENSE — ALLOWED
"Affiliate Partner of the Refined Place Network"
"In collaboration with Refined Place Network"
"Powered by Refined Place systems"
NOT ALLOWED
Using "Refined Place" as your primary name
Presenting as a Refined Place site
Logo as primary branding
TIER 3
Network-Connected Ministry
Ecosystem Member Â· Reference participation only Â· No brand integration

Churches and ministries that simply want referral access, resource sharing, occasional collaboration, and training materials. No platform integration. No reporting. No branding change.

Access includes
✓Referral access to Refined Place locations
✓Resource sharing and community support tools
✓Training materials and curriculum access
✓Occasional collaboration and grant participation
ECOSYSTEM LICENSE — ALLOWED LANGUAGE
"Supported by Refined Place training and resources"
"Participating organization in the network"
NOT ALLOWED
Affiliate or co-brand language
Saying "we are" or "we are part of" Refined Place
Logo usage beyond supported-by acknowledgment
Grant positioning advantage

Even Tier 3 members strengthen grant applications — funders prefer multi-site collaboration, measurable outcomes across multiple locations, and distributed care ecosystems with centralized coordination.

The Network Is Not a Replacement System

Churches do not have to become Refined Places to benefit from the network. The platform is a connective infrastructure layer that sits above existing ministries — strengthening and amplifying their impact without replacing what God already built.

Tier 1
Brand Extension
Carries the Refined Place name. Controlled identity.
Tier 2
Co-Branded Affiliate
Keeps own identity. Structured endorsement only.
Tier 3
Ecosystem Member
References participation only. No brand integration.
Who Can Join at Any Tier

The Refined Place Network actively seeks partnerships with any ministry or organization already doing the work — regardless of size, denomination, or current technology level.

✓Recovery Ministries
✓Celebrate Recovery Groups
✓Church Outreach Programs
✓Family Ministries
✓Homeless Outreach
✓Prison Re-Entry Programs
✓Food Distribution Ministries
✓Veterans Support Organizations
✓Transitional Housing Programs
✓Community Assistance Programs
Launch a New Ministry

Have a calling but no structure? The Refined Place Network provides a pathway for new ministry leaders — program design, community outreach planning, leadership development, technology implementation, grant readiness, and partnership development. Local leaders maintain full ownership of their ministry.

Apply to Join the Network
Launch a Refined Place in Your Community
Every Refined Place starts with a leader and a community. Whether you have an existing ministry or a calling to start one — this is how the network grows.
Application received. We will be in touch within 48 hours. Welcome to the Refined Place Network family.

Support the Mission

Every Gift Deployed.
Every Life Documented.

Every gift supports recovery programs, housing, workforce, and transportation — 100% of net program funds deployed. Administrative costs covered through platform licensing revenue.

General Fund
Supports all programs — most flexible gift.
Housing Fund
Funds Refined Place housing units and operations.
Workforce Initiative
Funds certifications, job placement, and employer partnerships.
Chariot Transportation
Fund rides to work, court, treatment, and church.
Document Recovery
Fund IDs, birth certificates, and vital records recovery.
Expansion Fund
New campuses, technology, and national partnership.

Our Recovery Framework

The Twelve Steps of a Refined Life

Recovery first, always. Each step builds real freedom — and quietly opens the door to the One who supplies the power to walk it out. All Scripture King James Version.

1
Honesty
I admit my life is unmanageable and I cannot fix this on my own strength.
Romans 7:18
2
Hope
I believe a power greater than myself can restore me to wholeness.
Mark 9:23
3
Surrender
I turn my will and my life over to the one true God who made me.
Proverbs 3:5–6
4
Searching
I make a fearless and honest inventory of my heart and my history.
Lamentations 3:40
5
Confession
I admit the exact nature of my wrongs to God, to myself, and to another.
James 5:16
6
Readiness
I see that religion without power fails — and become willing to be changed.
2 Timothy 3:5
7
Power
I humbly ask to receive the power that only His Spirit can supply.
Acts 1:8
8
Willingness
I list those I have harmed and become willing to make it right.
Luke 19:8
9
Amends
I make direct amends wherever possible, except when it would cause harm.
Matthew 5:23–24
10
Maintenance
I keep a daily account, and walk in true covenant — baptized in Jesus’ name.
1 Corinthians 11:28
11
Communion
I seek through prayer and His Word to know Him and follow His will daily.
Colossians 3:16
12
Mission
Filled with His Spirit, I carry this freedom to others. Acts 2:38 — complete.
Acts 2:38
Stories & Teaching

The Refiner’s Journal

Testimonies, teaching, and encouragement for the road of recovery. Add or edit posts in the BLOG data block in this file.

Testimony · June 2026
From the Pit to the Pulpit
One man’s journey from a jail cell to leading a recovery household — and what changed everything. Read →

Why Willpower Was Never Enough
Religion without power leaves you exhausted. Here is where the real power comes from. Read →
Encouragement · May 2026
The First 90 Days
What to expect, what to hold onto, and how to make it through the hardest stretch. Read →
42 CFR Part 2: Member recovery data protected under federal law — stronger than HIPAA. Never shared without written consent.  |  Not Medical Treatment: RRN is a faith-based ministry platform providing spiritual support, life skills, and peer accountability. Not a licensed clinical program. Emergencies: 911. Crisis line: 988.  |  Investment Disclaimer: No investment offering has been made. Interest expressions collect no funds. All formal investment via SEC Reg CF or Reg D after attorney review. WOTC credits and government grants cannot flow to investors. Projected returns are estimates only. Consult your financial and legal advisor.  |  Chariot: Drivers are independent community members, not employees of RRN LLC.  |  All Scripture from the King James Version. © 2026 Refined Recovery Network LLC. Port Allen, Louisiana. All rights reserved.

A Christ-centered life management and discipleship ministry. Recovery, workforce, housing, transportation, and community restoration. Louisiana first. Building nationwide.
